title: Eat Bottle
description: Solves the minor inventory management issue of extra potion bottles
body:
Have you ever drank a potion but been left with an extra bottle clogging your inventory? Tried to drop it but ended up picking it up again?

Wouldn't it be better if you could just...

![Eating a glass bottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8205cfeea1d531f8983cb03b7c9b8e1e20d8fa75.png)

**\*CRONCH\***

---

This mod lets you eat glass bottles :P

It restores 1 hunger point, 0 saturation, and deals 1 damage.
